inputs.label: Respiratory Score
inputs.businessContext: SOFA respiratory component score (0-4 based on PaO2/FiO2 ratio)

businessContext_i18n.en: SOFA respiratory component score (0-4 based on PaO2/FiO2 ratio)
businessContext_i18n.tr: SOFA solunum bileşen skoru (PaO2/FiO2 oranına göre 0-4)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score du composant respiratoire SOFA (0-4 basé sur le rapport PaO2/FiO2)
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación del componente respiratorio SOFA (0-4 basado en la relación PaO2/FiO2)

inputs.label: Coagulation Score
inputs.businessContext: SOFA coagulation component score (0-4 based on platelet count)

businessContext_i18n.en: SOFA coagulation component score (0-4 based on platelet count)
businessContext_i18n.tr: SOFA koagülasyon bileşen skoru (trombosit sayısına göre 0-4)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score du composant coagulation SOFA (0-4 basé sur le nombre de plaquettes)
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación del componente de coagulación SOFA (0-4 basado en el recuento de plaquetas)

inputs.label: Liver Score
inputs.businessContext: SOFA liver component score (0-4 based on bilirubin level)

businessContext_i18n.en: SOFA liver component score (0-4 based on bilirubin level)
businessContext_i18n.tr: SOFA karaciğer bileşen skoru (bilirubin seviyesine göre 0-4)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score du composant hépatique SOFA (0-4 basé sur le taux de bilirubine)
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación del componente hepático SOFA (0-4 basado en el nivel de bilirrubina)

inputs.label: Cardiovascular Score
inputs.businessContext: SOFA cardiovascular component score (0-4 based on mean arterial pressure and vasopressor dosage)

businessContext_i18n.en: SOFA cardiovascular component score (0-4 based on mean arterial pressure and vasopressor dosage)
businessContext_i18n.tr: SOFA kardiyovasküler bileşen skoru (ortalama arter basıncı ve vazopresör dozuna göre 0-4)
businessContext_i18n.de: SOFA-kardiovaskulärer Komponenten-Score (0-4 basierend auf mittlerem arteriellen Druck und Vasopressordosierung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score du composant cardiovasculaire SOFA (0-4 basé sur la pression artérielle moyenne et la posologie des vasopresseurs)
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación del componente cardiovascular SOFA (0-4 según presión arterial media y dosis de vasopresores)

inputs.label: CNS Score
inputs.businessContext: SOFA central nervous system score (0-4 based on Glasgow Coma Scale)

businessContext_i18n.en: SOFA central nervous system score (0-4 based on Glasgow Coma Scale)
businessContext_i18n.tr: SOFA merkezi sinir sistemi skoru (Glasgow Koma Skalasına göre 0-4)
businessContext_i18n.de: SOFA-ZNS-Komponenten-Score (0-4 basierend auf Glasgow Coma Scale)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score du système nerveux central SOFA (0-4 basé sur l'échelle de Glasgow)
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación del componente del sistema nervioso central SOFA (0-4 según la escala de coma de Glasgow)

inputs.label: Renal Score
inputs.businessContext: SOFA renal component score (0-4 based on creatinine level or urine output)

businessContext_i18n.en: SOFA renal component score (0-4 based on creatinine level or urine output)
businessContext_i18n.tr: SOFA renal bileşen skoru (kreatinin seviyesi veya idrar çıkışına göre 0-4)
businessContext_i18n.de: SOFA-Nierenkomponenten-Score (0-4 basierend auf Kreatininspiegel oder Urinausscheidung)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Score du composant rénal SOFA (0-4 basé sur le taux de créatinine ou le débit urinaire)
businessContext_i18n.es: Puntuación del componente renal SOFA (0-4 según nivel de creatinina o producción de orina)

formulas.totalSOFA: respScore + coagScore + liverScore + cvScore + cnsScore + renalScore

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
